note: SEED data captured from Google Maps by hand — replaced automatically by tools/fetch-google-reviews.js once API credentials are set. See tools/README-google-reviews.md.

reviews.author: Shelly R.
reviews.text: We had an absolutely outstanding experience purchasing our 2026 Forest River Berkshire XL 37B! From start to finish, everyone made the process smooth, enjoyable, and stress free.

reviews.author: Rhonda E.
reviews.text: This was not my first RV purchase so I had my own expectations… which were certainly met by Motor Home Specialists! Working with Cowboy Langley and William Illa was superb! From the initial negotiations, the ordering of the coach, the delivery — superb.

reviews.author: Jeannie B.
reviews.text: Christine was so amazing to work with, her patience and kindness made our experience there feel welcoming. They take their time and answer any questions you have. Overall we had a great experience here, lots of inventory to look through to make the best decision for your needs.
